sections.paragraph:
διαφέρω [διά, φέρω, cp. διάφορος]

—1. ‘transport from one point in space to another’, carry

—a. w. focus on space covered in transport carry through Mk 11:16; Ac 13:49.

—b. w. focus on kind of movement in transport, pass. be tossed about Ac 27:27.

—2. ‘be unlike’, differ

—a. of difference in pers. status Gal 4:1; of prestige relating to heavenly bodies 1 Cor 15:41; impers. οὐδέν μοι διαφέρει it makes no difference to me Gal 2:6.

—b. of difference in worth or value, be worth more Mt 6:26; 10:31; cp. 12:12; Lk 12:7, 24. —τἀ διαφέροντα things that have greater value/significance Ro 2:18; Phil 1:10.
